description_long: This is a freestanding vertical banner with a sleek, rectangular display surface supported by a slim metal frame. The front face features a striking black background adorned with a colorful, swirling abstract pattern in shades of purple, pink, red, yellow, and green, along with the text 'Qseg' and 'ONE CHOICE' in white. The banner is held upright by two horizontal stabilizing feet at the base, which are visible from the side views. The rear and side views reveal the thinness of the banner and the minimalistic support structure, emphasizing its lightweight and portable design. The surface appears to be made of a smooth, possibly synthetic fabric or vinyl material stretched tightly over the frame. This type of banner is commonly used for advertising or informational purposes in public or commercial spaces.
description: A tall, freestanding vertical banner with a colorful abstract design and text on a black background, supported by a slim metal frame and stabilizing feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full printed design, including the colorful abstract pattern and white text on a black background.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the banner and the metal support structure with horizontal stabilizing feet.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same printed design and overall structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the supporting metal feet.
attribute_banner_content: company logo, abstract pattern, advertisement text
